signals.headline: CLARITY Act Misses April Timeline in US Senate | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2][4]
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Misses April Timeline in US Senate | NO | HIGH confidence** [1][2][4]

The US Senate Banking Committee failed to schedule the CLARITY Act for markup in the April 20-24 window, dashing expectations for passage this month and sparking market hesitation across **Bitcoin**, **Ethereum**, and **XRP** prices.[1][2][4] This delay, confirmed as the bill risks dying without action by late April
